---
title: "The RedeC2 Team"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
execute:
  echo: false
  eval: true
  freeze: auto
  cache: false
  warning: false
  message: false
  include: true
  inline: true
resources:
  - ../_input_data/C2_team_images/
  - ../_input_data/icons/
---


```{r setup, include=FALSE}
# Load required libraries
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
library(htmltools)
library(openxlsx)

# Read team data from Excel
team_data <- openxlsx::read.xlsx("../_input_data/C2_team.xlsx")

# Clean column names (Excel might have spaces or special characters)
names(team_data) <- make.names(names(team_data))  # Convert to valid R names

# Create photo filenames WITHOUT accents
team_data <- team_data %>%
  mutate(
    # Extract first letter for alphabetical grouping
    first_letter = str_sub(Member, 1, 1),
    
    # Create standardized photo filename
    photo_file = tolower(Member) %>%
      # Remove Portuguese accents
      str_replace_all("á|ã|â|à|Á|À|Ã|Â", "a") %>%
      str_replace_all("é|ê|è|É|È|Ê", "e") %>%
      str_replace_all("í|î|ì|Í|Ì|Î", "i") %>%
      str_replace_all("ó|õ|ô|ò|Ó|Ò|Õ|Ô", "o") %>%
      str_replace_all("ú|û|ù|Ú|Ù|Û", "u") %>%
      str_replace_all("ç|Ç", "c") %>%
      str_replace_all("ñ|Ñ", "n") %>%
      # Replace non-alphanumeric with underscores
      str_replace_all("[^a-z0-9]+", "_") %>%
      str_replace_all("_+", "_") %>%
      str_replace_all("^_|_$", "") %>%
      paste0(".jpg"),
    
    
    ifelse(file.exists(file.path("../_input_data/C2_team_images", photo_file)),
                       file.copy("../_input_data/C2_team_images/default.jpg", 
                                 paste0("_input_data/C2_team_images/", photo_file), overwrite = TRUE),
                       NA),
    
     # Create full photo path
photo_path = ifelse(file.exists(file.path("../_input_data/C2_team_images", photo_file)),
                    paste0("../_input_data/C2_team_images/", photo_file),
                    "../_input_data/C2_team_images/default.jpg") # fallback image
    
  )



# DEBUG: Show generated filenames
cat("\nGenerated photo filenames (first 5):\n")
print(head(team_data$photo_file, 5))
cat("\nPhoto paths (first 5):\n")
print(head(team_data$photo_path, 5))

# Check if files actually exist
cat("\nChecking if files exist:\n")
existing_files <- sapply(team_data$photo_file, 
                        function(f) file.exists(file.path("../_input_data/C2_team_images", f)))
cat("Found", sum(existing_files), "out of", nrow(team_data), "photo files\n")
if(any(!existing_files)) {
  cat("Missing files:\n")
  print(team_data$photo_file[!existing_files])
}
```


<style>
  body {
    background-image: url('/figures/c2_bg.jpg');
    background-repeat: repeat-y;
    background-size: cover;
    background-attachment: fixed;
    background-position: top center;
    position: relative;
    z-index: 0;
  }

  .background-overlay {
    position: fixed;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.8);
    z-index: -1;
  }

  .icon-link {
    display: inline-block;
    margin: 0 6px;
  }

  .icon-link img {
    width: 18px;
    height: 18px;
    vertical-align: text-bottom;
  }

  /* 3 colunas responsivas */
  .team-group {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(0, 1fr));
    gap: 24px;
    margin-bottom: 2rem;
  }

  .team-card {
    background: #f8f9fa;
    border-radius: 12px;
    box-shadow: 0 0 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
    padding: 1rem;
    width: 100%;
    transition: transform 0.3s ease;
  }

  .team-card:hover {
    transform: scale(1.05);
    z-index: 2;
  }

  .team-photo {
    width: 100%;
    height: 260px;
    object-fit: cover;
    border-radius: 10px;
    margin-bottom: 1rem;
  }

  .team-info {
    text-align: center;
  }

  .team-info p a {
    margin: 0 6px;
    color: #007bff;
    font-size: 1.1rem;
  }

  .team-name {
    margin-top: 0;
    margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
    text-align: center;
  }

  .team-controls {
    max-width: 960px;
    margin: 0 auto 1.5rem auto;
    text-align: center;
  }

  .team-search {
    padding: 0.4rem 0.6rem;
    width: 260px;
    max-width: 80%;
    border-radius: 6px;
    border: 1px solid #ccc;
    margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
  }

  .team-index {
    font-size: 0.95rem;
  }

  .team-index a {
    text-decoration: none;
    margin: 0 2px;
  }

  .team-index a:hover {
    text-decoration: underline;
  }

  @media (max-width: 900px) {
    .team-group {
      grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
    }
  }

  @media (max-width: 600px) {
    .team-group {
      grid-template-columns: 1fr;
    }
  }
</style>



```{r generate-team-cards, echo=FALSE}
# Function to generate HTML for each team member
generate_member_card <- function(member) {
  
  # SAFELY extract values - handle different column name possibilities
  get_value <- function(member, possible_names, default = "") {
    for(name in possible_names) {
      if(name %in% names(member) && !is.na(member[[name]]) && member[[name]] != "") {
        return(as.character(member[[name]]))
      }
    }
    return(default)
  }
  
  # Try different possible column names
  email <- get_value(member, c("Email", "email", "E.mail", "E.mail."))
  institution <- get_value(member, c("Institution", "Instittution", "Institution.", "Affiliation"))
  lattes <- get_value(member, c("Lattes", "Lattes.", "lattes"))
  orcid <- get_value(member, c("ORCID", "Orcid", "orcid", "ORCID."))
  scholar <- get_value(member, c("Google.Scholar", "Google.Scholar.", "GoogleScholar", "Scholar"))
  website <- get_value(member, c("Personal.Website", "Personal.Website.", "Website", "PersonalWebsite"))
  
  # Default for missing institution
  if(institution == "") institution <- "Affiliation not specified"
  
  # Start building icon links - USE CORRECT ICON PATHS
  icon_html <- ""
  
  # Email icon - USING _input_data/icons/
  if(email != "") {
    icon_html <- paste0(icon_html, 
      '<a class="icon-link" href="mailto:', email, '">
        <img src="../_input_data/icons/_email.png" alt="Email"/>
      </a>')
  }
  
  # Lattes icon
  if(lattes != "") {
    icon_html <- paste0(icon_html,
      '<a class="icon-link" href="', lattes, '" target="_blank">
        <img src="../_input_data/icons/_lattes.png" alt="Lattes"/>
      </a>')
  }
  
  # ORCID icon
  if(orcid != "") {
    icon_html <- paste0(icon_html,
      '<a class="icon-link" href="', orcid, '" target="_blank">
        <img src="../_input_data/icons/_orcid.png" alt="ORCID"/>
      </a>')
  }
  
  # Google Scholar icon
  if(scholar != "") {
    icon_html <- paste0(icon_html,
      '<a class="icon-link" href="', scholar, '" target="_blank">
        <img src="../_input_data/icons/_scholar.png" alt="Google Scholar"/>
      </a>')
  }
  
  # Personal Website icon
  if(website != "") {
    icon_html <- paste0(icon_html,
      '<a class="icon-link" href="', website, '" target="_blank">
        <img src="../_input_data/icons/website.png" alt="Personal Website"/>
      </a>')
  }
  
  # Generate the HTML card with CORRECT PHOTO PATH
  card_html <- paste0('
  <div class="team-card" id="letter-', member$first_letter, '">
    <img src="', member$photo_path, '" alt="', htmlEscape(member$Member), '" class="team-photo" />
    <div class="team-info">
      <h3 class="team-name">', htmlEscape(member$Member), '</h3>
      <p>', icon_html, '</p>
      <p>RedeC2 member at ', htmlEscape(institution), '</p>
    </div>
  </div>')
  
  return(card_html)
}

# Sort team data alphabetically by Member name
team_data <- team_data[order(team_data$Member), ]

# Generate all team cards
all_cards <- ""
for(i in 1:nrow(team_data)) {
  all_cards <- paste0(all_cards, generate_member_card(team_data[i, ]))
}

# Generate alphabetical index with only letters that have members
letters_present <- unique(toupper(team_data$first_letter))
letter_links <- sapply(LETTERS, function(letter) {
  if(letter %in% letters_present) {
    paste0('<a href="#letter-', letter, '">', letter, '</a>')
  } else {
    paste0('<span style="color:#ccc; cursor:default;">', letter, '</span>')
  }
})

# Create the complete team HTML structure
team_html <- HTML(paste0('
<div class="team-controls">
  <input type="text" id="team-search" class="team-search" placeholder="Search by name..." />
  <div class="team-index">
    ', paste(letter_links, collapse = " | "), '
  </div>
</div>

<div class="team-group">
', all_cards, '
</div>'))
```

```{=html}
`r team_html`
```

```{=html}
<script>
  // Search functionality
  document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function() {
    const searchInput = document.getElementById("team-search");
    if (!searchInput) return;

    searchInput.addEventListener("input", function() {
      const term = this.value.toLowerCase();
      const cards = document.querySelectorAll(".team-card");

      cards.forEach(function(card) {
        const nameEl = card.querySelector(".team-name");
        const name = nameEl ? nameEl.textContent.toLowerCase() : "";
        const institutionEl = card.querySelector(".team-info p:last-child");
        const institution = institutionEl ? institutionEl.textContent.toLowerCase() : "";
        
        // Show card if name OR institution contains search term
        card.style.display = (name.includes(term) || institution.includes(term)) ? "" : "none";
      });
    });
  });
</script>
```
